description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional lounge upholstered in a deep blue material, featuring a chaise extension on the right side. The lounge has three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion that extends into the chaise. The armrests are straight, broad, and of equal height, providing a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short and minimally visible, giving the lounge a low-profile appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to a sleek and clean look. This lounge is suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, offering ample seating and comfort.
description: A modern blue L-shaped sectional lounge with a chaise, three back cushions, and broad straight armrests. The upholstery is smooth and solid, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, and the chaise extension on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the armrest and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, uninterrupted back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seat section and the left armrest, with the chaise receding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion with an integrated chaise section; all cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with three segmented, rectangular cushions; no tufting or curvature, clean and modern.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, broad, and boxy armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs barely visible beneath the base, likely made of wood or metal, providing a low-profile stance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
